It is a specific style of Ukrainian Baro: Salo ne na musamman na tsarin gine-ginen Ukrainian Baroque wanda ya bunkasa a karshen karni na 17 da farkon karni na 18. An sanya masa sunan Mazepa saboda gagarumin goyon bayansa ga ginin coci da fasaha lokacin mulkinsa a matsayin Hetman.
What happened after the Battle of Poltav: Me ya faru bayan Yakin Poltava?
After the decisive defeat, Mazepa and Ch: Bayan babban kashi da suka samu, Mazepa da Charles XII sun gudu zuwa Daular Usmaniyya don neman tsari. Mazepa ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka a birnin Bendery. Peter the Great ya takaita ikon cin gashin kai na Hetmanate sosai, wanda ya tsananta ikon Rasha a kan Ukraine.
Born in Nahuievychi, Kingdom of Galicia: An haife shi a Nahuievychi, Lardin Galicia da Lodomeria (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Enrolls at Lviv University and begins pu: Ya shiga Jami'ar Lviv sannan ya fara buga ayyukansa na farko na adabi.
First arrested for socialist activities: An kama shi a karon farko saboda ayyukan gurguzu da kuma kasancewa memba na kungiyar sirri.
Co-founds the Ruthenian-Ukrainian Radica: Ya hada hannu wajen kafa Ruthenian-Ukrainian Radical Party, jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko ta zamani a Ukraine.
Defends his doctoral dissertation, 'Barl: Ya kare takardar bincikensa ta digirin digirgir (PhD) 'Barlaam and Josaphat' a Jami'ar Vienna.
Publishes his philosophical epic poem 'M: Ya buga wakarsa ta tarihi ta falsafa 'Moses' (Мойсей), wadda take zama ginshikin gadonsa na adabi.
Nominated for the Nobel Prize in Literat: An ba da shawarar sunansa don kyautar Nobel Prize in Literature.
Dies in Lviv at the age of 59, impoveris: Ya mutu a Lviv yana da shekaru 59, a matsayin talaka amma ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa.
He wrote over 6,000 works, including poe: Ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 6,000, ciki har da waka, zantuka, wasannin kwaikwayo, da kuma fassara, wanda ya tsara adabin Ukraine na zamani sosai.
He co-founded the first modern Ukrainian: Ya hada hannu wajen kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko ta zamani a Ukraine sannan ya goyi bayan gurguzu da kuma hakkin kasa na Ukraine akai-akai.
He authored numerous academic works in h: Ya rubuta manyan ayyukan ilimi a kan tarihi, al'adu, da kuma sukar adabi, inda ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) daga Jami'ar Vienna.
He translated approximately 200 authors: Ya fassara ayyukan marubuta kusan 200 daga harsuna 14 zuwa harshen Ukraine, ciki har da ayyukan Shakespeare, Goethe, da kuma Dante.
It means 'The Stone-Breaker' in Ukrainia: Yana nufin 'Makerin Dutse' (The Stone-Breaker) a harshen Ukraine, wanda ya fito daga shahararriyar wakarsa mai wannan sunan. Yana nuna alamar aikin rayuwarsa na fasa duwatsu na zalunci don samar da hanyar 'yanci ga mutanensa.
Despite earning his doctorate and being: Duk da cewa ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) kuma ya kware sosai, hukumomin Austro-Hungarian sun dakatar da nada shi a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Lviv saboda ayyukansa na siyasa na gurguzu da na goyon bayan Ukraine.
He was nominated for the Nobel Prize in: An ba da shawarar sunansa don kyautar Nobel Prize in Literature a karshen shekarar 1915, kuma an girmama takararsa sosai. Sai dai, ya mutu a watan Mayu shekarar 1916 kafin kwamitin ya yanke shawara, kuma ba a bayyar da kyautar bayan mutuwa.
What was his relationship with the Russi: Yaya alakar sa take da Daular Rasha?
He was a sharp critic of Russian tsarist: Ya kasance mai sukar mulkin kama-karya na Rasha na tsarist da kuma manufofinsa na zalunci yaki da harshe da al'adun Ukraine. Galibi ana hana ayyukansa a cikin Daular Rasha.
An haife shi a Avcıköy, Crimea, Daular Rasha.
Travels to Paris, where he is influenced: Ya tafi Paris, inda ra'ayoyin 'yanci na Faransa da na gurguzu suka shafe shi.
First attempts to get permission from th: Yunkurin farko don samun izini daga gwamnatin Rasha don buga jarida da harshen Turkic, amma aka hana shi.
Successfully founds the newspaper Tercim: Ya yi nasarar kafa jaridar Terciman (The Interpreter) a Bakhchysarai, wadda ta zama muryar masana na Turkic.
Establishes a 'New Method' (Usul-i Jadid: Ya kafa makarantar 'Sabuwar Hanya' (Usul-i Jadid) a Bakhchysarai, wanda ya kaddamar da gyaran iliminsa.
Elected chairman of the First All-Russia: An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban First All-Russian Muslim Congress, wani babban mataki na tsara ayyukan siyasa na Musulmai a cikin daular.
Dies in Bakhchysarai, Crimea, leaving a: Ya mutu a Bakhchysarai, Crimea, inda ya bar gadon gyara da wayewa.
Established the first long-running Turki: Ya kafa jarida ta farko ta harshen Turkic a Rasha, wadda ta zama babban makami na sadarwa da gyare-gyare a tsakanin mutanen Turkic na tsawon shekaru sama da 35.
Pioneered an educational reform movement: Ya kaddamar da gyaran ilimi ('Sabuwar Hanya') wanda ya shigo da darussa na zamani da kuma hanyoyin koyarwa na zamani a cikin makarantun Musulmai a daukacin Daular Rasha.
Advocated for and developed a simplified: Ya goyi bayan kuma ya samar da harshen Turkic mai sauki kuma na gama gari, bisa Ottoman Turkish, don samar da hadin kai tsakanin kungiyoyin da ke magana da harshen Turkic daban-daban.
'Jadid' comes from the Arabic word for ': 'Jadid' ya fito ne da kalmar Larabci na 'sabuwa' (jadīd). Tafiyar, watau Jadidism, ta ginu ne a kan 'sabuwar hanya' (usul-i jadid) ta ilimi wadda Gasprinsky ya goyi baya.
Why was his newspaper called Terciman (T: Me yasa aka kira jaridarsa Terciman (The Interpreter)?
The name reflected its mission: to 'inte: Sunan yana nuna manufarta: don 'fassara' duniyar zamani ga mutanen Turkic na Daular Rasha sannan ta kasance gadar sadarwa tsakanin al'adun Rasha da na Turkic.
Was Gasprinsky against Islam?: Shin Gasprinsky yana yaki da Musulunci ne?
No, he was a devout Muslim. He believed: A'a, shi musulmi ne nagari. Ya yi imanin cewa Musulunci yana tafiya da zamani kuma ya bayyana cewa rashin ilimi ne, ba wai bangaskiya ba, ya jawo rashin ci gaban mutanensa. Burinsa shi ne ya gyara kuma ya zamanantar da al'ummar musulmi, ba wai ya bar addininsa ba.
His motto was 'Dilde, fikirde, işte birl: Takensa shi ne 'Dilde, fikirde, işte birlik,' wanda ke nufin 'Hadin kai a harshe, tunani, da aiki.' Yana nuna hangen nesansa na dunkulewar duniyar Turkic da ci gabanta.
Born in Kashan, Persia (modern-day Iran): An haife shi a Kashan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Observed a lunar eclipse in Kashan, whic: Ya lura da husufin wata a Kashan, wanda daga baya ya yi amfani da shi don auna lissafinsa.
Completed his work 'Sullam al-Sama' ('Th: Ya kammala aikinsa 'Sullam al-Sama' ('The Stairway of Heaven') a kan girma da nisan taurari.
Was invited by Prince Ulugh Beg to join: Yarima Ulugh Beg ya gayyace shi don ya shiga cibiyar kimiyya a Samarkand.
Completed 'The Treatise on the Circumfer: Ya kammala 'The Treatise on the Circumference', inda ya auna 2π zuwa sexagesimal digits guda 9, wanda daidai yake da decimal guda 16.
Completed his magnum opus, 'Miftah al-Hi: Ya kammala babban littafinsa, 'Miftah al-Hisab' ('The Key to Arithmetic'), wanda ke bayyana amfani da decimal fractions.
Died in Samarkand, under circumstances t: Ya mutu a Samarkand, a cikin yanayi da har yanzu masana tarihi ke yin muhawara a kai.
He calculated the value of pi to 16 deci: Ya auna darajar pi zuwa decimal guda 16, wanda ya zama tarihin duniya da ya tsaya na kusan shekaru 180.
He systematized and explained the arithm: Ya tsara kuma ya bayyana lissafin decimal fractions a cikin littafinsa 'The Key to Arithmetic', wanda ya zama da matukar mahimmanci ga makomar lissafi.
He provided an explicit statement of the: Ya samar da takamaiman bayani na dokar cosines a cikin tsari mai dacewa don triangulation a cikin taswirar sararin samaniyarsa.
He invented the 'Plate of Conjunctions,': Ya kirkiro 'Plate of Conjunctions', wata kwamfuta ta analog don tantance lokacin rana da matsayin taurari.
Is it true he invented the decimal point: Shin da gaske ne ya kirkiro decimal point?
While he didn't invent the point symbol: Kodayake bai kirkiro alamar kanta ba, ya samar kuma ya tsara lissafin decimal fractions, wani babban mataki ga lissafi na zamani.
What was his relationship with Ulugh Beg: Yaya alakar sa take da Ulugh Beg?
He was a highly respected, leading schol: Ya kasance masani mai daraja kuma shugaba a fadar Ulugh Beg da observatory dinsa, kodayake wasu wasikunsa na kashin kansa sun nuna alaka mai sarkakiya da sarki mai yawan bukata.
The exact cause is unknown. While some h: Ainihin dalilin ba a sani ba. Yayin da wasu bayanai na tarihi ke ikirarin cewa an kashe shi ne da umarnin Ulugh Beg saboda ya kasance mai fadin gaskiya sosai, wasu kuma sun nuna cewa ya mutu sakamakon rashin lafiya ta dabi'a. Gaskiyar lamarin ta kasance asiri.
Born as Muhammed Qanapiya in the Kushmur: An haife shi a matsayin Muhammed Qanapiya a sansanin Kushmurun, yankin Kostanay.
Enrolled in the Omsk Cadet Corps, a Russ: Ya shiga cikin Omsk Cadet Corps, wata makarantar soja ta Rasha.
Graduated from the Cadet Corps and began: Ya kammala karatu a Cadet Corps sannan ya fara aikin soja a matsayin aide-de-camp ga Gwamna-Janar na Yammacin Siberia.
Undertook his first major scholarly expe: Ya gudanar da bincikensa na farko mai girma na ilimi zuwa yank인 Issyk-Kul, inda ya rubuta sassa na Epic of Manas.
Conducted a perilous secret mission to K: Ya gudanar da wani binciken sirri mai hadari zuwa Kashgar, inda ya boye kansa a matsayin dan kasuwa, sannan ya tara bayanai masu mahimmanci na al'adu da na soja.
Worked in St. Petersburg at the Foreign: Ya yi aiki a St. Petersburg a Ofishin Harkokin Waje da kuma Russian Geographical Society, wanda ya sanya shi zama fitaccen masanin ilimi.
Died from tuberculosis at the age of 29: Ya mutu sakamakon cutar daji ta huhu (tuberculosis) yana da shekaru 29 a yankin Altyn-Emel.
He undertook a perilous, disguised journ: Ya gudanar da tafiya mai hadari inda ya boye kansa zuwa birnin Kashgar da aka rufe, wanda ya samar da bayanai masu mahimmanci na sirri da al'adu ga Daular Rasha.
He was the first scholar to record a sig: Ya kasance masani na farko da ya rubuta babban sashi na shahararren wasan baka na Kyrgyz (Kyrgyz oral epic), inda ya kiyaye shi ga mutanen gobe.
His extensive writings on the history, c: Dinbin rubuce-rubucensa a kan tarihi, al'adu, da al'adun mutanen Tsakiyar Asiya sun kafa ginshikin karatun Kazakh na zamani.
Was he really a descendant of Genghis Kh: Shin da gaske ne shi jikan Genghis Khan ne?
Yes, he was a direct descendant through: E, shi jikansa ne kai-tsaye ta hynar kakansa Ablai Khan, wani sarki mai karfi na Middle Horde, wanda ya biyo bayan nasarar layinsa zuwa Jochi, dan farko na Genghis Khan.
They became close friends in Omsk while: Sun zama abokai na kusa a Omsk lokacin da Dostoevsky yake gudun hijira. Dostoevsky ya girmama ilimin Walikhanov da dabi'unsa sosai, inda ya kira shi Kazakh 'mai hazaka' kuma 'mai ban sha'awa' da ya sami ilimin Turai.
Why is he called the 'Comet of the Stepp: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Comet of the Steppe'?
This nickname reflects his brilliant but: Wannan lakabi yana nuna rayuwarsa mai ban sha'awa amma ta kare cikin bakin ciki da wuri. Ya bayyana a matsayin haske mai haske na ilimi, ya haskaka duniya da aikinsa, sannan ya bace da wuri yana da shekaru 29.
Born into a wealthy family in Constantin: An haife ta a cikin dangi mai dukiya a Constantinople.
Participated in the bride-show for Emper: Ta shiga cikin bride-show don neman auren Sarki Theophilos, inda shahararren musayar magana na fasaha ya faru.
Founded a convent in Constantinople and: Ta kafa convent (gidan mata na addini) a Constantinople sannan ta zama shugabarta ta farko, bayan karshen zamanin Iconoclast na biyu.
Died. The exact year of her death is unk: Ta mutu. Ainihin shekarar mutuwarta ba ta da tabbas.
Venerated as a saint in the Eastern Orth: Ana girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 7 ga Satumba.
Earliest Known Female Composer: Mace ta Farko da aka Sani da ke Hada Kade-kade
She is one of the earliest medieval comp: Tana daya daqun mawaƙa mata na farko na Lokacin Tsakiya wadanda ayyukansu suka rage kuma masana da mawaƙa na zamani za su iya fassara su.
Authored approximately 50 hymns, many of: Ta rubuta wakoki na coci kusan 50, wadanda da yawa daga cikinsu har yanzu ana amfani da su a ayyukan ibada na Orthodox, musamman shahararriyar 'Hymn of Kassiani' dinta.
Abbess and Advocate: Shugabar Gidan Ibada da Mai Kare Bangaskiya
Founded a convent and served as a staunc: Ta kafa gidan mata na addini sannan ta zama mai kariya mai karfi ga girmama icons lokacin Byzantine Iconoclasm.
Wrote over 260 non-liturgical verses, in: Ta rubuta wakoki sama da 260 wadanda ba na coci ba, ciki har da epigrams da gnomic verses, wanda ke nuna fasaharta da iliminta.
Why didn't Kassia marry the emperor?: Me yasa Kassia ba ta auri sarki ba?
During the bride-show, Emperor Theophilo: Lokacin bride-show, Sarki Theophilos ya bayyana cewa mata su ne hanyar shiga mummuna (yana nuni ga Hauwa/Eve). Kassia ta mayar masa da martani cewa mata kuma su ne hanyar shiga mafi alheri mai girma (tana nuni ga Budurwa Maryama). Iliminta da jaruntakarta sun sa sarkin ya zabi wata amarya daban mai saukin kai.
Her most famous composition is the 'Hymn: Aikinta mafi shahara shi ne 'Hymn of Kassiani' (wanda kuma aka sani da Troparion of Kassiani), wanda ake rera shi lokacin Holy Week a cikin Cocin Orthodox. Yana ba da labarin macen mai zunubi wadda ta shafa wa kafafun Yesu mai.
Yes, Kassia is venerated as a saint in t: E, ana girmama Kassia a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 7 ga Satumba.
What was the Iconoclasm she lived throug: Menene Iconoclasm da ta rayu a ciki?
It was a major religious and political c: Ya kasance babban rikici na addini da siyasa a Daular Byzantine a kan amfani da hotunan addini (icons). Kassia ta kasance 'iconodule', watau mai kare girmama icons yaki da 'iconoclasts' wadanda ke son lalata su.
Born in Constantinople to Emperor Manuel: An haife shi a Constantinople ga Sarki Manuel II Palaiologos da Helena Dragaš.
Becomes co-Despot of the Morea, a Byzant: Ya zama co-Despot na Morea, wani lardin Byzantine a Peloponnese, tare da yayunsa.
Ascends to the Byzantine throne as Const: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Byzantine a matsayin Constantine XI Palaiologos bayan mutuwar dan uwansa John VIII.
Mehmed II becomes the Ottoman Sultan and: Mehmed II ya zama Sultan na Ottoman sannan ya fara shiri don cin Constantinople da yaki.
The final siege of Constantinople by the: Kewaye birnin Constantinople na karshe da Daular Usmaniyya ta yi ya fara.
Dies in battle during the final assault: Ya mutu a yaki lokacin hari na karshe yayin da birnin ya shiga hannun Ottomans, wanda ke nuna karshen Daular Byzantine.
He successfully expanded Byzantine terri: Ya yi nasarar fadada yankin Byzantine a Peloponnese, wani babban nasarar soja da ta gudanarwa ga daular ta baya.
Led a valiant, though ultimately doomed,: Ya jagoranci kariya ta jaruntaka, kodayake ta gaza a karshe, na babban birninsa na tsawon kwanaki 53 yaki da sojojin Ottoman da suka fi shi yawa gaba daya.
His death in battle transformed him into: Mutuwarsa a yaki ta sauya shi ya zama shahararren mutum na sadaukarwa ga asalin kasar Greek da kuma addinin Kirista na Orthodox, wanda aka sani da 'Marble Emperor'.
Did he really say 'The city has fallen a: Shin da gaske ne ya ce 'Birnin ya rushe kuma ina raye'?
This is a legendary quote, likely apocry: Wannan wata shahararriyar magana ce ta tatsuniya, wataƙila ba ta gaske ba ce. Maganarsa da aka fi sani ta tarihi ita ce ki yarda da ya yi na mika birnin ga Sultan Mehmed II, inda ya bayyana cewa ba nasa ba ne da zai bayyar.
Why is he sometimes called Constantine X: Me yasa wani lokacin ake kiran sa Constantine XII?
Some historians count Constantine Laskar: Wasu masana tarihi suna hada da Constantine Laskaris, wanda kila an nada shi sarki lokacin da aka kewaye birnin a Fourth Crusade a shekarar 1204. Sai dai, Constantine XI shi ne tsari da lambar da masana tarihi suka fi amfani da ita.
No, his body was never definitively iden: A'a, ba a taba tantance gawarsa ba bayan yakin. Wannan rashin tabbas ya taimaka wa tatsuniyoyi na komawarsa, musamman tatsuniyar 'Marble Emperor' wanda ke barci yana jiran 'yantar da birnin.
An haife shi a matsayin jikan Genghis Khan.
Proclaimed Great Khan of the Mongol Empi: An shelanta shi a matsayin Great Khan na Daular Mongol bayan ya kayar da dan uwansa Ariq Boke.
Officially established the Yuan dynasty: Ya kafa daular Yuan a hukumance sannan ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Sarkin China.
Marco Polo allegedly arrives at Kublai K: An ce Marco Polo ya isa fadar Kublai Khan a Dadu (Beijing).
Completed the conquest of the Southern S: Ya kammala cin Daular Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya hada daukacin kasar China karkashin mulkinsa.
Launched two naval invasions of Japan, b: Ya kaddamar da mamayar teku guda biyu na Japan, wadanda duka biyun suka gaza, wani sashi sakamakon guguwa mai girma.
Ya mutu a Dadu yana da shekaru 78.
He established the first foreign-led dyn: Ya kafa daular farko ta kasashen waje wadda ta mulki daukacin kasar China, inda ya mayar da babban birnin zuwa Dadu (Beijing ta yanzu).
He completed the conquest of the Souther: Ya kammala cin Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya kawo karshen rabuwar kasar China ta tsawon shekaru sama da 300.
Promotion of Eurasian Trade: Inganta Kasuwanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya (Eurasian Trade)
His reign, part of the Pax Mongolica, sa: Mulkinsa, wanda yake zama bangaren Pax Mongolica, ya shaida hanyoyin kasuwanci masu aminci da bunkasa kamar Hanyar Siliki, wadda ke hada Gabas da Yamma.
Patron of Culture and Science: Mai Tallafa wa Al'adu da Kimiyya
He promoted arts, science, and engineeri: Ya inganta fasaha, kimiyya, da injiniyanci, sannan ya yi amfani da hakurin addini, wanda ya ba wa addinai daban-daban damar zama tare a cikin daularsa.
Was Kublai Khan Chinese?: Shin Kublai Khan dan kasar China ne?
No, he was a Mongol of the Borjigin clan: A'a, shi dan kasar Mongol ne na kabilar Borjigin. Sai dai, ya zama sarki na farko na daular Yuan ta China, inda ya karbi tsarin siyasa da al'adu na China don gudanar da mulki.
Did Marco Polo really meet Kublai Khan?: Shin da gaske ne Marco Polo ya hadu da Kublai Khan?
While Marco Polo's own account is the pr: Kodayake labarin Marco Polo kansa shi ne babban tushen labarin, mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ya yi aiki a fadar Kublai Khan na tsawon kusan shekaru 17, duk da cewa ainihin tsarin aikinsa ana yin muhawara a kai.
Why did Kublai Khan's invasions of Japan: Me yasa mamayar Japan da Kublai Khan ya yi ta gaza?
Both invasions in 1274 and 1281 were thw: Duka mamayar biyu a shekarun 1274 da 1281 sun gaza sakamakon hadakar tirjiya mai karfi ta mutanen Japan da kuma guguwa mai karfi (typhoons), wadda mutanen Japan daga baya suka kira ta 'kamikaze' ko 'iskoki na Allah'.
How was Kublai Khan related to Genghis K: Yaya Kublai Khan yake da alaka da Genghis Khan?
Kublai Khan was the grandson of Genghis: Kublai Khan jikan Genghis Khan ne. Shi ne dan hudu na Tolui, wanda ya kasance dan karanci shekaru na Genghis Khan.
Born in or near Kyiv, daughter of Grand: An haife ta a ciki ko kusa da Kyiv, yar Grand Prince Yaroslav the Wise na Kievan Rus'.
Marries King Henry I of France in Reims: Ta auri Sarki Henry I na Faransa a Reims Cathedral, wando ya sanya ta zama Sarauniyar Franks.
Gives birth to her first son and future: Ta haifi danta na farko kuma sarki na gaba, Philip I.
King Henry I dies. Anne serves as regent: Sarki Henry I ya mutu. Anne ta yi aiki a matsayin mai kula da dansa Philip I mai shekaru takwas.
Marries Count Ralph IV of Valois, causin: Ta auri Count Ralph IV na Valois, wanda ya haifar da babbar badakala da kuma cire ta daga coci na wani dan lokaci.
Last recorded signature on a document un: Sa hannu na karshe da aka rubuta a kan takarda karkashin mulkin danta Philip. Ainihin ranar mutuwarta ba ta da tabbas.
Literate Queen and Regent: Sarauniya da Mai Kula mai Ilimi
As one of the few literate royals at the: A matsayinta na daya daqun mutanen sarauta kalilan masu ilimi a fadar Faransa, ta shiga cikin gudanar da mulki sosai, inda sa hannunta ke bayyana a kan takardun hukuma.
Her marriage established a significant p: Aurenta ya kafa babban alakar siyasa da al'adu tsakanin Kievan Rus' mai karfi da kuma daular Capetian ta Faransa da ke bunkasa.
She successfully secured the throne for: Ta yi nasarar tabbatar da karagar mulki ga danta Philip I, kuma ta hanyarsa, ta zama kakar sarakunan Faransa na gaba.
Was Anne of Kyiv really more educated th: Shin da gaske ne Anne na Kyiv tana da ilimi fiye da na fadar Faransa?
Yes, historical evidence suggests the co: E, shaidun tarihi sun nuna cewa fadar Yaroslav the Wise a Kyiv ta kasance babban cibiyar ilimi. Anne tana iya karatu da rubutu a Old East Slavic, da kuma wataƙila Helenanci, yayin da manyan mutane da yawa na Yammacin Turai, ciki har da mijinta Sarki Henry I, kila ba su da ilimi.
Why was her second marriage so controver: Me yasa aurenta na biyu ya kasance mai matukar cece-kuce?
Her second marriage so controversial?: Mijinta na biyu, Count Ralph IV na Valois, yana da aure riga. Ya bar matarsa don ya auri Anne, wanda hakan ya sa Paparoma ya cire su duka daga coci saboda zina da auren mace fiye da daya.
Her most lasting legacy is the introduct: Babban gadonta mai dorewa shi ne shigar da sunan Helenanci 'Philip' a cikin iyalai na sarauta na Yammacin Turai, wanda ta ba wa dansa. Haka kuma ana tunawa da ita a matsayin sarauniya mai iko da ilimi wadda ta hada alakar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yammacin Turai.
Born in Pskov (approximate date) and lat: An haife ta a Pskov (kimanin shekara) sannan daga baya ta auri Igor na Kyiv.
Igor of Kyiv is murdered by the Drevlian: Drevlians sun kashe Igor na Kyiv. Olga ta zama mai kula da danta Sviatoslav.
Carries out a four-part, systematic reve: Ta gudanar da daukar fansa na kashi hudu yaki da Drevlians, wanda ya kare da kona babban birninsu Iskorosten.
Institutes administrative reforms, estab: Ta kafa gyare-gyaren gudanarwa, inda ta kafa hanyoyin 'pogosti' (cibiyoyin gudanarwa) don tara haraji cikin tsari.
Travels to Constantinople and is baptize: Ta tafi Constantinople sannan aka yi mata baftisma a addinin Kirista na Orthodox, inda ta dauki sunan Kirista Elena (Helen).
Dies in Kyiv. She was later canonized as: Ta mutu a Kyiv. Daga baya Cocin Orthodox ta nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.
Avenged her husband's murder with brutal: Ta dauki fansar mutuwar mijinta cikin rash인 tausayi, inda ta kayar da Drevlians sannan ta karfafa ikonta ga daular Rurik.
Established the first legal and administ: Ta kafa tsarin shari'a da na gudanarwa na farko a Kievan Rus', inda ta samar da 'pogosti' don tara haraji da gudanar da mulki cikin tsari.
Became the first Rus' ruler to convert t: Ta zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta shiga addinin Kirista, wanda ya kafa ginshikin shigar addinin Kirista na daukacin kasar ta hannun jikanta, Vladimir Mai Girma.
Were Olga's acts of revenge real?: Shin daukar fansar Olga ta kasance ta gaske?
While likely embellished in the Primary: Kodayake ana iya samun karin gishiri a cikin Primary Chronicle, masana tarihi suna kallon ainihin al'amuran daukar fansarta a matsayin bayyanar nasararta da karfafa ikonta cikin rashin tausayi yaki da kabilar Drevlian mai tawaye.
Why is Olga venerated as a saint?: Me yasa ake girmama Olga a matsayin tsarkaka?
She is venerated as a saint in the Easte: Ana girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox da Roman Catholic saboda zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta karbi addinin Kirista. Wannan ya ba ta lakabin 'Isapostolos' (Equal-to-the-Apostles).
Did she succeed in converting her son, S: Shin ta yi nasarar shigar da danta Sviatoslav addinin Kirista?
No, she failed to persuade her son Sviat: A'a, ta gaza shawo kan danta Sviatoslav, wanda ya ci gaba da zama arna. Sai dai, tasirinta ya sa jikanta Vladimir Mai Girma ya mayar da addinin Kirista ya zama addinin kasa na Kievan Rus'.
Born into serfdom in the village of Mory: An haife shi a cikin bauta (serfdom) a kauyen Moryntsi, Daular Rasha.
Freed from serfdom through the efforts o: An 'yantar da shi daga bauta ta hanyar kokarin Karl Bryullov da Vasily Zhukovsky.
Publishes his first and most famous coll: Ya buga tarin wakokinsa na farko kuma mafi shahara, 'Kobzar'.
Arrested for his involvement in the poli: An kama shi saboda shigarsa cikin kungiyar siyasa ta Brotherhood of Saints Cyril and Methodius sannan an tura shi gudun hijira.
Released from his ten-year military exil: An sake shi daga gudun hijirarsa na soja na tsawon shekaru goma bayan mutuwar Tsar Nicholas I.
Dies in Saint Petersburg at the age of 4: Ya mutu a Saint Petersburg yana da shekaru 47. Daga baya aka sake binne shi a Ukraine.
His collection of poems that laid the fo: Tarin wakokinsa wadanda suka kafa ginshikin adabin Ukraine na zamani da kuma harshen adabi na Ukraine.
He elevated the vernacular Ukrainian lan: Ya daukaka harshen Ukraine na gida, wanda a baya ake kallonsa a matsayin yare kawai, ya zama matsayin adabi mai girma.
His life of struggle and his revolutiona: Rayuwarsa ta gwagwarmaya da wakokinsa na juyin juya hali sun mayar da shi alama mai karfi da dorewa ta yakin neman 'yancin kai na Ukraine.
Beyond poetry, he was a talented painter: Bayan waka, ya kasance hazikin mai zane, inda ya samar da ayyuka sama da 800 sannan ya zama Academician a Imperial Academy of Arts.
The title comes from his most famous poe: Lakabin ya fito ne daga tarin wakokinsa mafi shahara. 'Kobzars' sun kasance mawaƙan gargajiya na Ukraine wadanda ke tafiya a kasa, suna rera wakoki na tarihi yayin da suke rera wani makami mai suna kobza. Sunan yana hada shi da wannan tsohuwar al'adar gargajiya.
No, he was also a highly accomplished pa: A'a, ya kasance kwararren mai zane kuma mai fasaha. Ya kasance cikakken memba na Imperial Academy of Arts a Saint Petersburg kuma ya samar da daruruwan hotunan mutane, shimfidar kasa, da kuma zane-zane.
Why was his exile so harsh?: Me yasa gudun hijirarsa yake da matukar tsanani?
Tsar Nicholas I was personally infuriate: Tsar Nicholas I ya yi fushi sosai da wakarsa ta barkwanci ta Shevchenko 'The Dream,' wadda ke nuna wulakanci ga Tsar da matarsa. Sakamakon haka, Tsar da kansa ya kara tsauraran kalmomin 'karkashin tsauraran tsaro, tare da haramta rubutu da zane' a cikin hukumcinsa, da nufin lalata ruhinsa na fasaha.
His artistic talent was recognized by pr: Manyan masu zane na Rasha sun gane hazakarsa ta fasaha. Sun tsara caca (lottery), inda suka sayar da hoton mawaƙi Vasily Zhukovsky wanda Karl Bryullov ya zana, sannan suka yi amfani da rubles 2,500 da aka tara don sayan 'yancinsa daga hannun mai gidan a shekarar 1838.
Tamar is born to King George III and Que: An haifi Tamar ga Sarki George III da Sarauniya Burdukhan.
Appointed co-ruler and heir apparent by: Mahaifinta George III ya nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulki da magajiya.
Becomes the sole monarch of Georgia upon: Ta zama sarki daya tilo na Georgia bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, inda ta dauki lakabin 'Mepe' (Sarki).
Is forced by the nobility to marry the R: Sarakuna sun tilasta mata auren sarki na Rus' Yuri Bogolyubsky.
Divorces and banishes Yuri due to his mi: Ta kashe auren sannan ta kori Yuri saboda mummuna dabi'unsa.
Chooses and marries the Alan prince Davi: Ta zabi kuma ta auri sarki na Alan David Soslan.
Georgian armies led by David Soslan achi: Sojojin Georgia karkashin jagorancin David Soslan sun samu gagarumar nasara a Yakin Shamkor.
Georgian forces win a decisive victory o: Dakarun Georgia sun samu nasara a kan Seljuk Sultanate na Rum a Yakin Basian.
Helps establish the Empire of Trebizond: Ta taimaka wajen kafa Daular Trebizond a bakin Tekun Black a matsayin kasar karkashin tsaron Georgia.
Tamar dies, leaving behind a powerful an: Tamar ta mutu, inda ta bar masarauta mai karfi da wadata. Daga baya an nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.
First Female Ruler of Georgia: Mace ta Farko da ta Mulki Georgia
Became the first woman to rule Georgia i: Ta zama mace ta farko da ta mulki Georgia da kanta, inda ta dauki lakabin maza 'Mepe' (Sarki) don nuna cikekken ikonta na sarki.
Apex of the Georgian Golden Age: Mafi Girman Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia
Her reign marked the peak of Georgia's p: Mulkin ta ya nuna kololuwar karfin siyasa, karfin tattalin arziki, da bunkasar al'adu na Georgia a Lokacin Tsakiya (High Middle Ages).
Military Expansion and Victories: Fadada Kasa ta hanyar Soja da Nasarori
Presided over significant military victo: Ta jagoranci manyan nasarori na soja a Shamkor (1195) da Basian (1202), wanda ya fadada tasirin Georgia a daukacin Caucasus.
Her era saw a flowering of arts and lite: Zamaninta ya shaida bunkasar fasaha da adabi, ciki har da wakar tarihi ta Shota Rustaveli, kuma ta kasance babbar mai tallafa wa coci-coci da monasteries na Georgian Orthodox.
Why was Tamar called 'King' (Mepe) and n: Me yasa aka kira Tamar 'Sarki' (Mepe) maimakon 'Sarauniya'?
To legitimize her rule in a patriarchal: Don tabbatar da mulkinta a cikin al'ummar maza da kuma tabbatar da matsayinta na sarki mai cikekken iko, daidai da kowane sarki namiji, maimakon a kalle ta a matsayin matar sarki (queen consort) ko mai kula mara karfi.
A historical period in the High Middle A: Wani lokaci ne na tarihi a Lokacin Tsakiya, daga karni na 11 zuwa na 13, lokacin da Masarautar Georgia ta kai kololuwar karfin soja, yankin kasa, da kuma nasarorin al'adu. Ana kallon mulkin Tamar a matsayin mafi girmansa.
Is Tamar of Georgia a saint?: Shin Tamar ta Georgia tsarkaka ce?
Yes, she is highly venerated in the Geor: E, ana girmama ta sosai a cikin Cocin Georgian Orthodox a matsayin tsarkaka, wadda aka nada ta a matsayin 'Holy Righteous King Tamar'. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 1 ga Mayu (da kuma 14 ga Mayu).
What was her relationship with the poet: Yaya alakarta take da mawaƙi Shota Rustaveli?
Shota Rustaveli, Georgia's national poet: Shota Rustaveli, mawaƙin kasa na Georgia, ya rubuta wakarsa 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' lokacin mulkinta. An sadaukar da wakar ga Tamar, yana yaba mata sannan yana nuna dabi'u na jarumtaka na fadarta.
Born in Constantinople or Cyprus, to a f: An haife ta a Constantinople ko Cyprus, a cikin dangi na talakawa; mahaifinta ya kasance mai kula da dabbobin bear ga Hippodrome.
Meets Justinian, the heir to the throne,: Ta hadu da Justinian, magajin karagar mulki, a Constantinople. Ta kasance tana aiki a matsayin actress da kuma courtesan.
Marries Justinian. He had the law change: Ta auri Justinian. Ya canza doka don ba da damar aurensu, tun da a baya doka ta hana jami'ai auren actresses.
Crowned Augusta (Empress) alongside Just: An nada ta a matsayin Augusta (Sarauniya) tare da Justinian a matsayin Augustus (Sarki) na Daular Byzantine.
Plays a pivotal role in convincing Justi: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shawo kan Justinian ya zauna sannan ya murkushe Bore na Nika, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa.
Enacts significant social reforms, inclu: Ta kaddamar da manyan gyaran al'umma, ciki har da dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole sannan suka fadada hakkin mata a saki da mallakar filaye.
Dies, likely from cancer, in Constantino: Ta mutu, wataƙila sakamakon cutar daji (cancer), a Constantinople. Justinian ya yi alhini sosai gare ta kuma bai sake yin aure ba.
Her refusal to flee and her powerful spe: Kin guduwa da ta yi da kuma jawabinta mai karfi sun zaburar da Sarki Justinian ya murkushe babban boren, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa da daular.
She championed laws that prohibited forc: Ta kare dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole, suka ba wa mata karin hakki wajen saki, sannan suka ba su damar mallakar da gadon dukiya.
She acted as Justinian's chief advisor a: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara ga Justinian da abokiyar mulki ta zahiri, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin daula, addini, da na waje.
Despite the official state religion bein: Duk da cewa addinin kasa na hukumance shi ne Chalcedonian Christianity, ta yi amfani da ikonta don kare da tallafa wa al'ummar Miaphysite, wadanda ake kallo a matsayin bidi'a.
Was Theodora really an actress and court: Shin da gaske ne Theodora actress ce da kuma courtesan?
Yes, the contemporary historian Procopiu: E, masanin tarihin lokacin Procopius ya rubuta game da rayuwarta ta farko a cikin 'Secret History' dinsa. Kodayake ana kallon labarinsa a matsayin na gaba da kuma wataƙila da karin gishiri saboda dalilai na siyasa, masana tarihi gaba daya sun amince da ainihin bayanai na tarihinta na mai wasa.
How did she become empress if she was fr: Yaya ta zama sarauniya idan ta fito daga dangi na talakawa?
